goal.objective: Implement exact Specialist Run handoff transitions and deterministic inspection in parallel over the frozen foundation.

assumptions.statement: ADR 0005 and the Specialist Run contract are the complete implementation authority.
assumptions.rationale: Architecture fan-in passed and no blocking decision remains.

assumptions.statement: After native apply_patch fails before mutation, the host may perform an exact precondition-hash-guarded PowerShell write inside the approved scope.
assumptions.rationale: Foundation Revision 1 proved the temporary worktree patch helper is unavailable while bounded escalated PowerShell writes remain auditable and fail closed.

assumptions.statement: All runtime, persistence, Git, merge, and memory effects remain external to core.
assumptions.rationale: V12 is a pure evidence session, not the deferred universal scheduler.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Implement monotonic handoff recording, exact replay, conflict rejection, dependency gates, terminal non-pass routing, and unchanged-state failure.

evidenceRequirements.description: Provide transition, replay, routing, diagnostic precedence, and immutability evidence for AC3 and AC4.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Implement every-agent status, manifest-resolved dependency eligibility, accepted evidence, routes, complete-roster readiness, and closed next actions.

evidenceRequirements.description: Provide DAG status, manifest resolution, evidence binding, and complete-roster readiness evidence for AC2 and AC5.

contextSources.description: Accepted immutable Specialist Run Session decision.
Existing bounded canonical JSON and framed digest primitives.
Existing package construction and verification fixtures.
Existing public kernel constants and limits.
Existing diagnostic registry and stable operation result helpers.
Existing adversarial package and handoff tests.
Frozen normative Specialist Run contract.
Frozen V12 run-session schema validator.
Frozen V12 run-session JSON Schema.
Frozen V12 session creation, restoration, and validation foundation.
Frozen V12 run-session wire and public types.
Existing defensive JSON snapshot and deep-freeze boundary.
Existing package-bound raw handoff and fan-in implementation.
Existing rendered package verification and manifest resolution.
Existing V11 compiler, package, and handoff types.
Frozen V12 verification obligations.
Frozen V12 feature specification.

forbiddenEffects: Do not use network access, change Git state, launch descendants, write outside the exact scope, or claim that core performs host effects.

workUnits.objective: Implement monotonic handoff recording, exact replay, conflict rejection, dependency gates, terminal non-pass routing, and unchanged-state failure.

module.action: Compose V11 handoff verification with the frozen session validator and add the complete transition matrix for AC3 and AC4.

stopConditions: If native apply_patch fails before mutation because of the host sandbox, an exact precondition-hash-guarded PowerShell write is allowed within the declared write scope; verify the resulting file bytes immediately.
Return only the concrete closed SpecialistAgentHandoff JSON shape from the generated contract.
Run only local focused verification allowed by the contract and report every failing command truthfully.
Stop if any declared source is unavailable or fails its exact digest and byte binding.
Write only the exact declared write scope; do not change Git state, use the network, launch descendants, or widen the public contract.

workUnits.objective: Implement every-agent status, manifest-resolved dependency eligibility, accepted evidence, routes, complete-roster readiness, and closed next actions.

module.action: Derive the closed inspection from the frozen package DAG and accepted handoffs, add DAG and differential readiness coverage, and preserve the external-host boundary for AC2 and AC5.
